message:
fix(render-term): render bands by kind instead of all as lifelines

The terminal band rendering was treating ALL LayoutBandKind variants
as dashed vertical lifelines. Now correctly dispatches:

- Lane: dashed vertical lifeline at band center (sequence diagrams)
- Section: horizontal top/bottom border lines (gantt sections)
- Column: vertical separator on right edge (kanban columns)

Previously, gantt sections and kanban columns would render as
incorrect dashed vertical lines instead of their proper shapes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
